title: A new generation of structural biologists in China.
author_string: Li, Sai, Su, Ming-Yuan, Li, Long, Cai, Tiantian, Zhang, Zhe et al.
abstract: We have asked young scientists who spoke at our recent Cell Symposium "Structural biology from the nanoscale to cellular mesoscale" in Huangshan, China to tell us more about themselves and their exciting research in this collection of Voices.
